hero.tagline: Together with our families, we invite you to celebrate our wedding.

welcome.title: Welcome
welcome.body: We are looking forward to seeing you on the 12th of June 2027. The ceremony will take place at Phoenix Cernica, Strada Strandului 62, 077145 Pantelimon, Romania at 16:00.

program.title: Ceremony & Program
program.subtitle: The timeline of our special day

events.description: Pictures and reception in the garden

events.title: Evening Party
events.description: Dance and celebrate into the night

rsvp.title: Confirm Your Presence
rsvp.subtitle: Thank you for confirming your presence before 30/05/2027.

dresscode.title: Dress Code
dresscode.subtitle: Cocktail — A balance between elegant and comfortable.
dresscode.women: Women: Knee-length, tea-length, or midi dresses.

form.messagePlaceholder: Write a message or any special note…
form.starterNote: A selection of canapés and starters will be served.
starters: Brie cheese tartlet with redcurrant jam
Goose and chicken liver terrine with candied fruit and orange chutney with chilli
Cheese roulade with grapes in baked walnut crust
Canapé cups with pike roe and chives
Fig with goat cheese and almond flakes
Cherry tomatoes with mozzarella and basil
mainCourseItems: Fish Course: Sea bream fillet with lemon butter sauce served with white risotto
Traditional Course: Cabbage rolls with polenta, bacon, sour cream and hot pepper
Main Course: Duck confit leg served with celeriac purée and pear in red wine sauce
form.gdpr: I agree to my personal data being stored and used solely for the purpose of organising this wedding event, in accordance with GDPR.

accommodation.title: Hotels & Accommodation
accommodation.subtitle: We recommend the following options near the venue

honeymoon.title: Honeymoon Fund
honeymoon.body: Your presence, your good mood and your desire to celebrate our union are all we wish for on this special day. If you would like to give us a small gift, we are planning a trip for our honeymoon. You can contribute to our project either online by clicking on the Contribute button below, or through the gift box available at the reception venue on the wedding day.
honeymoon.wishPlaceholder: Write a heartfelt wish for René & Ramona…
